race.comment: TAAJWAR (7) gave away a considerable start over 1211m at this track last time before hitting the line well to finish fourth. Got home well and the longer journey looks ideal. Well placed and hard to hold off. DURHAM (4) resumes. Good effort to kick-off last prep when in the money at Horsham over this trip. Bold showing expected. DALI'S PICASSO (2) improved last start to finish third over at Edenhope. Faces a similar assignment so he is one of the main contenders. FIERCE KIWI (11) is a filly by Fierce Impact out of Kiwi Colleen who is at the races for the first time today. Looks ready after placing in a recent Murray Bridge trial. One of the main contenders with the blinkers applied. FIORENTE RULES (8) will improve off her first-up run here and gets a key switch with Milnes taking over. Don't dismiss.
